TypeSignature.Value: .class public interface auto ansi abstract beforefieldinit IByUserFederatedIdentityCredential

Docs.summary: Provides an interface for acquiring tokens using the User Federated Identity Credential (UserFIC) flow.

MemberSignature.Value: public Microsoft.Identity.Client.AcquireTokenByUserFederatedIdentityCredentialParameterBuilder AcquireTokenByUserFederatedIdentityCredential (System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable<string> scopes, string username, string assertion);

.method public hidebysig newslot virtual instance class Microsoft.Identity.Client.AcquireTokenByUserFederatedIdentityCredentialParameterBuilder AcquireTokenByUserFederatedIdentityCredential(class System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable`1<string> scopes, string username, string assertion) cil managed

Public Function AcquireTokenByUserFederatedIdentityCredential (scopes As IEnumerable(Of String), username As String, assertion As String) As AcquireTokenByUserFederatedIdentityCredentialParameterBuilder

Docs.param: Scopes requested to access a protected API.
The UPN (User Principal Name) of the user, e.g. john.doe@contoso.com.
The federated identity credential assertion (JWT) for the user. Acquire this token from a Managed Identity or Confidential Client application before calling this method.
Docs.summary: Acquires a token on behalf of a user using a federated identity credential assertion. This uses the user_fic grant type.
Docs.returns: A builder enabling you to add optional parameters before executing the token request.
